string 2:
Hey! Long time no see. I know this is random, but... what's
it mean to be "the Twentiest"?
{next}That's a tough one.
{next}Nobody knows.
{next}To be at the end of your twenties.

I know, right? And up until just recently, I thought I had
it all figured out...

True... Maybe everyone's working at being the Twentiest
because it's such a mystery.

Haha... Trying to cheer me up with a joke, are you? Well, I
appreciate the thought.

I just don't understand what's "in" anymore. It's like my
path to the Twentiest is gone.

There's nothing worse than being normal. I mean, just LOOK
at that outfit of yours!
{next}Is it really so bad to be normal?
{next}What's wrong with my outfit?
{next}Should I jazz it up more?

It's terrible! When you're normal, you don't stand out. The
Twentiest has to stand out!

If I knew THAT, I wouldn't feel so lost! Your clothes should
be torn, melted... something!

Jazz it up... Yeah! Creative self-expression through
improvisation is so Twentiest!

Oh! I think I just got closer to the essence of the
Twentiest by talking to you. Thanks!

Say... would you mind showing me more of your fashion next
time?

A T-shirt with a Digimon on it would be perfect to get me
out of this funk. Thanks!

I want to see you in an outfit you've put some effort into.
Nothing normal.
Oh! It's you! And that outfit... it's so Twentiest!
{next}It is?
{next}So this outfit helped?
{next}You've finally got it, huh?

Yeah! The extra flair that goes beyond normal fashion...
That's it! That's Twentiest!

Absolutely! Inspiration's hitting me thirty times a second
now!

Haha... Yeah, finally! Just this once, let me call you
"Master Twentiest"!

Your fashion sense is like regular, spicy curry combined
with a hint of honey!

I've been trying too hard. The more one tries to be
Twentiest, the further away one gets.

You can't overdo the flash in your fashion! You've got to
keep it simple, like an accent.
{next}You learn fast.
{next}There's no easy road to the Twentiest.
{next}Like cooking without fancy ingredients?
I see. So I've finally reached the same heights as you...

It's true. There are many twists and turns. At times you
lose it; at times it branches.

What? Comparing the Twentiest to cooking? Ridiculous! Next,
you'll say it's like curry!

Touching the truth of the Twentiest is making me Digivolve!
To greater heights of fashion!
Yaaaaah!

This form is proof of my growth toward the Twentiest! And
it's all because of you!

The best thing in the world is being normal. I think I
underestimated it before.

I heard there's an arena in the Factorial Area. I'd like to
test my skills in a fashion showdown!

Pursuing normalcy, I put in normal work for a normal win...
But it just felt so... normal!

Is this all normality has to offer? Is this... as far as I
can go?
Perhaps the thing to do now is step off the normal path...

I can't let it end like this! I'm... going to stand out!
Rise above the ordinary!

This cursed blade has an extraordinary edge. I rediscovered
the path of the Twentiest.
{next}You look really strong.
{next}The Twentiest again?
{next}Cursed weapons can be powerful, too.

Heh... You think so, too? I agree. I cannot wait to put this
newfound power to the test!

Yes... Digimon all begin and end with the Twentiest. Such is
the nature of things.

Why must curses always be bad? By my honor as the Twentiest,
I swear to master this weapon!

I would test my new power at the Paradise Colosseum. I will
await your challenge!
